title: Rana
description: This mod adds Indev Rana in your Minecraft. Don't harm it.
body:
日本語での説明

Features

This mod adds Indev Rana in your Minecraft.

Don't harm it.

Where to find

Spawn in anywhere, like pigs or chickens.

Don't harm it.

How to breed

Use sliced melons to breed them.

Don't harm it.

Accidentally harmed? How to recover its health

Use honey bottle to recover its health by 6. They'll return empty bottle.

Don't harm it.

How to use

Tame!

Use honey bottle to tame them.

Don't harm it.

Attack!!

Attacks enemies when ordered to do so.

Don't harm it.

Equip!!!

Right click with sword or axe to equip rana with them.

Don't harm it.

Drop!!!!

There are apples for some reason. By the way it is said that they will drop apples. (Rare drops golden apple and enchanted golden apple)

Don't harm it.

Ah it's over

It can't do anything but described above.

Don't harm it.

(Last 2 pics are using Create Mod)
